outcome: Participants abstinent at end of treatment
source_quote: The observed proportion of subjects achieving abstinence in the last 2 weeks of maintenance medication phase of the trial was 12/61 (19.67%) in Lofex-Dro and 12/61 (19.67%) in PBO
Any Adverse Event: Placebo 46 (75.4), Lofex-Dro 47 (77.0), p-value 1.000 (Table 3)
There were two Serious Adverse Events (SAEs) during the trial, one in each arm of the study and both taking place during the placebo-lead out week.
This paper is a study protocol (PELSTAB study, NCT04340323) describing planned methods. No outcome results data are reported.
